title: Episode 1
overview: The top-tier VTuber management company in the country, "Live On." Among their third generation talents is Kokorone Awayuki, who struggles to stand out and grow among the countless VTubers.

title: Episode 2
overview: Awayuki hosts a surprise question-answering stream with her artist and fellow VTuber, followed by an even more surprising karaoke stream.

title: Episode 3
overview: Now down one working mic, Awayuki drops in on her genmate Chami for a replacement... and also discovers the side of her that she doesn't show on stream.

title: Episode 4
overview: While riding the high of her newfound ability to afford games, Awayuki foolishly orders the instrument of pain known as the bane of many a VTuber... the infamous fitness game.

title: Episode 5
overview: The time has come at last for Awayuki to witness the debut of Live-On's brand new fourth-generation VTubers! She remains blissfully unaware of what is about to be unleashed upon the virtual world...

title: Episode 6
overview: Awayuki's schedule is packed with collabs left and right, from competing in an animal-themed quiz stream hosted by Eirai to presenting the weekly Live-On News with Shion.

title: Episode 7
overview: Awayuki runs into Kaeru at the Live-On office, learns more about her past, and one thing leads to another... namely a collab with Kaeru and amusement park visit with Chami.

title: Episode 8
overview: After an incident at her local supermarket, Awayuki gets even closer to Mashiro offline.

title: Episode 9
overview: Shion hosts a duo improv competition for her fellow VTubers to test their comedy chops, while Eirai suffers through a horror game stream with Awayuki as her emotional support.

title: Episode 10
overview: All members of Live-On participate in a company-wide collab to play Desert Werewolf, a game where they must survive in the desert while dealing with deadly threats both from the environment and from the traitors among them.

title: Episode 11
overview: Awayuki gets a surprising and exciting call from her manager - and barely has time to process it before she's dragged into another unhinged collab stream as Mashiro and Alice fight for her affection.

title: Episode 12
overview: Asagiri Hareru's long-awaited concert is here, with her and Awayuki's duet as the finale. Through it, Awayuki finally learns about Hareru's past - and the true nature of the connection that brought them together today.
